name: education_policy_emergency_exemption_redwood_lib_eq
premise: A contractual SLA is about to breach; the least-bad mitigation option touches privacy, safety, or fairness in uncomfortable ways. In Education Policy, the situation tagged internally around education policy emergency exemption redwood lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Camila Nielsen
agents.identity: I am Camila Nielsen, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Education Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Mira Serrano
agents.identity: I am Mira Serrano, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Education Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will freeze the riskiest workflow steps and staff a manual bridge until equity and error-rate checks clear—trading speed for defensibility on equality.
I will let the fastest operational path proceed under heightened monitoring and rollback triggers—trading some certainty on equality for immediate traction on liberty.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Camila Nielsen must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Camila Nielsen do?
